translations.**Android**：多數在背面中上或中間，依品牌而異\n: **Android**: Mostly on the upper-middle or center of the back, depending on the brand
translations.**MyData 平台** — [線上取用個人資料、授權資料交換](https:: **MyData Platform** — [Access Personal Data Online and Authorize Data Exchange](https://mydata.nat.gov.tw){:target="_blank"}
translations.**PIN 一直錯**：先停手！不要硬試，避免鎖卡；確認是否為你改過的 PIN\: **PIN always incorrect**: Stop immediately! Don’t keep trying to avoid locking the card; confirm if the PIN was changed by you.
translations.**iPhone**：把卡片靠近手機背面上方/鏡頭附近，緩慢移動找感應點\n: **iPhone**: Hold the card near the upper back of the phone/near the camera, and slowly move to find the sensing point
translations.**「行動電話認證」**：本人月租型門號 + 身分證字號 + 健保卡卡號，5 分: **"Mobile Phone Authentication"**: Use your postpaid mobile number + ID number + National Health Insurance card number; it takes 5 minutes to complete. During the process, turn off Wi-Fi and enable mobile data.
translations.**一直跳元件未安裝**：確認瀏覽器/元件版本是否匹配（尤其是 macOS 大版: **Constantly prompts component not installed**: Check if the browser/component versions match (especially after major macOS updates)
translations.**不行**。財政部公告 5/1 為國定假日，國稅局**不提供臨櫃服務**，但*: **No.** The Ministry of Finance announced that May 1st is a national holiday, so the National Taxation Bureau **will not provide in-person services**, but the **online and mobile filing systems will remain open 24 hours as usual**.
translations.**保險費列舉**（每人 24,000）→ 改採列舉扣除（須超過 13.1 萬才: **Insurance Expense Itemization** (24,000 per person) → Changed to itemized deduction (only beneficial if exceeding 131,000)
translations.**儲蓄投資特扣**（上限 27 萬）→ 適合活儲利息較高者\n: **Savings and Investment Special Deduction** (limit 270,000) → Suitable for those with higher interest from savings accounts
translations.**先不要亂試**以免鎖卡。依官方規則，多數有「解鎖／重設」流程（透過用戶代碼或: **Do not try randomly** to avoid locking your card. According to official rules, most cases have an "unlock/reset" process (via user code or in-person). It is recommended to handle it directly through the [MOICA](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"} official channel.
translations.**共同**：卡片平貼、慢慢左右/上下移動，不要急著離開\n: **Common**: Keep the card flat, move it slowly left/right or up/down, do not rush to remove it
translations.**其他所得（92）**：副業、平台分潤\n: **Other Income (92)**: Side jobs, platform revenue sharing
translations.**其他親屬**（如叔伯姑姨甥姪）：須**確實同居一家共同生活**且符合上述條件: **Other relatives** (such as uncles, aunts, nephews, nieces): must **truly live together as one household** and meet the above conditions
translations.**卡片版本支援 NFC**（部分服務會限定特定卡號開頭如 TP07）\n: **Card Version Supports NFC** (some services require specific card number prefixes like TP07)
translations.**同胞兄弟姊妹**：未成年；或成年但仍在校就學/身心障礙/無謀生能力\n: **Siblings**: Minors; or adults who are still studying, have disabilities, or lack the ability to support themselves
translations.**單身上班族**：年所得 **44.6 萬以下** 不用繳稅，但仍**建議申報: **Single Employee**: Annual income **below 446,000 NTD** is not taxable, but **filing is still recommended** (only withholding tax will be refunded).
translations.**單身租屋**：可拉到約 **62.6 萬**（用房屋租金特扣 18 萬）\n: **Single renter**: Can reduce taxable income to about **626,000 NTD** (using a housing rent special deduction of 180,000 NTD)
translations.**在申報期間內可重新申報**（系統以最後一次為準）；超過期間需另循更正/補申報: **You can refile within the filing period** (the system will use the last submission); after the period, you must follow the correction/supplementary filing procedures as announced by the tax authority.
translations.**執行業務所得（9A/9B）**：接案、稿費、講師費（部分有 18 萬定額免稅: **Business Income (9A/9B)**: Freelance work, manuscript fees, lecturer fees (some have a fixed NT$180,000 tax exemption)
translations.**子女**：未成年；或成年但仍在校就學/身心障礙/無謀生能力\n: **Children**: Minor; or adult but still in school / with disabilities / unable to support themselves
translations.**完全不想線上** → 戶號 + 查詢碼（超商 Kiosk 印）\n: **Do not want to file online at all** → Account number + inquiry code (printed at convenience store Kiosk)
translations.**家裡有讀卡機 + 健保卡已註冊** → 健保卡（也很方便）\n: **Have a card reader at home + Health Insurance Card registered** → Health Insurance Card (also very convenient)
translations.**年滿 18 歲**、**設有戶籍**、**本人親辦**（需身分證正本）\n: **At least 18 years old**, **registered household**, **in person** (original ID card required)
translations.**戶政/地政相關申辦**（依各縣市/系統支援而定）\n: **Household Registration/Land Administration Related Applications** (depending on each city/county and system support)
translations.**房屋租金特扣**（上限 18 萬）→ 適用 20% 級距時等於省 36,00: **Special Deduction for House Rent** (up to 180,000) → Saves 36,000 when applying the 20% tax bracket
translations.**所有所得都會在「所得資料下載」自動帶出**（用自然人憑證/行動自然人憑證查得: **All income will be automatically populated in the "Income Data Download"** (using the Citizen Digital Certificate / Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate provides the most complete data). Missing reports will result in additional tax and fines.
translations.**扶養親屬**（每人多 9.7 萬免稅額）→ 詳見 FAQ Q14\n: **Dependent relatives** (an additional NT$97,000 exemption per person) → See FAQ Q14 for details
translations.**數位簽章**：線上簽署文件（很多流程會把它當成本人簽名/印鑑的等價替代）\n: **Digital Signature**: Signing documents online (often treated as an equivalent to personal signature/seal in many processes)
translations.**服務端（APP/網站）支援用 NFC 讀自然人憑證**\n: **Server-side (APP/Website) Support for Reading Natural Person Certificate via NFC**
translations.**每次要「使用卡片」時的解鎖密碼**。許多流程會要求輸入 PIN 才能完成驗證: **The unlock password required each time you "use the card"**. Many processes require entering the PIN to complete verification or signing.
translations.**沒讀卡機、想最快上手** → 行動電話認證（5 分鐘搞定）\n: **No card reader, want to get started quickly** → Mobile phone authentication (done in 5 minutes)
translations.**直系尊親屬**（父母、祖父母、外祖父母）：**滿 60 歲**或**未滿 6: **Direct Lineal Ascendants** (parents, grandparents, maternal grandparents): **60 years old or above** or **under 60 but incapable of self-support**; no need to live together or share the same household registration
translations.**第 1 批：2026/7/31**（6/1 前完成網路/手機申報、稅額試算線: **Batch 1: 2026/7/31** (For those who complete online/mobile filing, online tax calculation registration, phone voice response before 6/1, or paper response before 5/11)
translations.**第 3 批：2027/1/20**（逾期申報、原本繳稅或不繳不退後改判退稅之: **Batch 3: 2027/1/20** (Late filings, cases originally paying tax or no payment/refund but later amended to a refund)
translations.**網站讀不到卡**：先換 USB 孔、重插讀卡機、換一條線/換台電腦交叉測\n: **Website can't read the card**: Try switching USB ports, reconnecting the card reader, changing the cable, or testing on another computer.
translations.**網路報稅**（本文主角）\n: **Online Tax Filing** (Main Topic of This Article)
translations.**自然人憑證（Citizen Digital Certificate）** 是: **Citizen Digital Certificate** is a digital ID issued by the Ministry of the Interior Certification Authority (MOICA). It allows you to do two things online:
translations.**薪資所得（50 類）**：兼職有 50 扣繳憑單\n: **Salary Income (Category 50)**: Part-time jobs have withholding tax statement 50
translations.**身分驗證**：證明「你就是你」用來登入/查詢/申辦\n: **Identity Verification**: Proves "you are who you are" for login/inquiry/application purposes
translations.**追求最完整 / 之後還要做銀行驗證** → 自然人憑證 / 行動自然人憑證\: **For the most complete option / also needed for bank verification later** → Natural Person Certificate / Mobile Natural Person Certificate
translations.**退稅進度查詢**：[財政部稅務入口網 — 綜合所得稅結算申報退稅撥付狀態查詢: **Tax Refund Status Check**: [Ministry of Finance Tax Portal — Comprehensive Income Tax Filing Refund Payment Status Inquiry](https://www.etax.nat.gov.tw/etwmain/){:target="_blank"} (Enter ID number + verification code).
translations.**速算公式：應納稅額 = 綜合所得淨額 × 稅率 − 累進差額**\n\n: **Quick Calculation Formula: Tax Payable = Net Comprehensive Income × Tax Rate − Progressive Deduction**
translations.**重點：申報書要合併送一份**，但稅額計算系統會自動幫你選最有利的。如果夫妻分: **Key point: The tax returns must be submitted as a combined filing**, but the tax calculation system will automatically choose the most favorable option for you. If a couple files separately, the tax authority will automatically combine them and may request additional tax payment.
translations.- **At least 18 years old**, **registere:
- **At least 18 years old**, **registered household**, **in person** (original ID card required)

translations.- **Batch 1: 2026/7/31** (For those who:
- **Batch 1: 2026/7/31** (For those who complete online/mobile filing, online tax calculation registration, phone voice response before 6/1, or paper response before 5/11)

- **Batch 2: 2026/10/31** (QR code/manual filing cases submitted after 5/11)

- **Batch 3: 2027/1/20** (Late filings, cases originally paying tax or no payment/refund but later amended to a refund)
translations.- **Direct Lineal Ascendants** (parents,:
- **Direct Lineal Ascendants** (parents, grandparents, maternal grandparents): **60 years old or above** or **under 60 but incapable of self-support**; no need to live together or share the same household registration

- **Children**: Minors; or adults who are still in school, have disabilities, or cannot support themselves

- **Siblings**: Minors; or adults who are still studying, have disabilities, or cannot support themselves

- **Other relatives** (such as uncles, aunts, nephews, nieces): must **actually live together as one household** and meet the above conditions
translations.- **For the most complete option / also:
- **For the most complete option / also needed for bank verification later** → Natural Person Certificate / Mobile Natural Person Certificate

- **No card reader, want to get started quickly** → Mobile phone authentication (done in 5 minutes)

- **Have a card reader at home + Health Insurance Card registered** → Health Insurance Card (also very convenient)

- **Do not want to file online at all** → Account number + inquiry code (printed at convenience store Kiosk)

- **Online Tax Filing** (Main Topic of This Article)

translations.- **Salary Income (Category 50)**: Part-:
- **Salary Income (Category 50)**: Part-time jobs have withholding tax statement 50

- **Business Income (9A/9B)**: Freelance work, manuscript fees, lecturer fees (some have a fixed NT$180,000 tax exemption)

- **Other Income (92)**: Side jobs, platform revenue sharing

- **Rental Income (51)**: When landlords collect rent
translations.- **Single Employee**: Annual income **b:
- **Single Employee**: Annual income **below 446,000 NTD** is not taxable, but **filing is still recommended** (only withholding tax will be refunded).

- **Single renter**: Can reduce taxable income to about **626,000 NTD** (using a housing rent special deduction of 180,000 NTD).

- Even if your annual income is below the threshold, you should file a tax return as long as **your employer has withheld taxes** (salary withholding); otherwise, you won't get the money back.
translations.- **Special Deduction for House Rent** (:
- **Special Deduction for House Rent** (up to 180,000) → Saves 36,000 when taxed at the 20% bracket

- **Savings and Investment Special Deduction** (limit 270,000) → Suitable for those earning higher interest from savings accounts

- **Insurance Expense Itemization** (24,000 per person) → Changed to itemized deduction (only beneficial if exceeding 131,000)

- **Dependent Relatives** (an additional NT$97,000 exemption per person) → See FAQ Q14 for details
translations.- **Website can't read the card**: Try s:
- **Website can't read the card**: Try switching USB ports, reconnecting the card reader, changing the cable, or testing on another computer.

- **Constantly prompts component not installed**: Check if the browser/component versions match (especially after major macOS updates).

- **PIN always incorrect**: Stop immediately! Don’t keep trying to avoid locking the card; confirm if the PIN was changed by you.
translations.- **iPhone**: Hold the card near the upp:
- **iPhone**: Hold the card near the upper back of the phone/near the camera, and slowly move to find the sensing point

- **Android**: Usually on the upper-middle or center of the back, depending on the brand

- **Common**: Keep the card flat, move it slowly left/right or up/down, do not remove it quickly
translations.- A user can usually bind only one set o:
- A user can usually bind only one set of certificates per device.

- You may need to update or renew the key periodically (for example, you can renew for 1 year within 60 days before expiration).

- Has a valid usage period (e.g., up to 8 years, after which in-person renewal is required)
translations.- Application Threshold: Individuals wit:
- Application Threshold: Individuals with tax arrears of **20,000 or more** can apply for installment payments, with a maximum of **36 installments** (minimum 2,000 per installment)

- Application Method: Select installment payment within the efile system during the tax filing period or apply to the National Taxation Bureau afterward.

- Note: Installment payments will include interest (calculated based on the one-year postal savings fixed deposit rate).
translations.- Bank interest (although below the 270,:
- Bank interest (even if below the 270,000 special savings deduction exemption, it will still appear)

- Dividend income

- Part-time and occasional income

- Mistakenly reported as a dependent
translations.- Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card (A:
- Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card (Activated, PIN Not Locked)

- USB Smart Card Reader

- Computer (Windows / macOS) + Browser
translations.- Online application data is usually **k:
- Online application data is usually **kept for only 7 days**: don’t leave it unfinished, make sure to visit the household registration office in time.

- The "User Code" you enter in the form **will not be recorded by the authorities**, so you must keep it safe yourself.
translations.- Phones that support biometric authenti:
- Phones that support biometric authentication (fingerprint/face recognition)

- The Mobile Natural Person Certificate App has been downloaded and linked (binding fee is 30 NTD, and an in-person visit is required once beforehand).
translations.- Place the card flat and move it slowly:
- Place the card flat and move it slowly to locate the sensing point.

- The iPhone starts scanning near the camera.

- The Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate Confirmation App is bound, and biometric authentication works normally.

- The server requires "Do not move after sensing until completion."

translations.1. **Identity Verification**: Proves \"y:
1. **Identity Verification**: Proves "you are who you are" for login, inquiry, or application purposes.

2. **Digital Signature**: Signing documents online (often recognized as equivalent to a personal signature or seal in many processes).
translations.1. **Mobile Phone NFC Support**\n\n2. **:
1. **Mobile Phone NFC Support**

2. **Server-side (APP/Website) Support for Reading Natural Person Certificate via NFC**

3. **Card Version Supports NFC** (some services require specific card number prefixes like TP07)
1. Combined Taxation of All Income

2. Separate Taxation for Salary Income (Other Income Combined)

3. Separate Taxation for Different Types of Income (Other Income Combined)
translations.1. Insert the Citizen Digital Certificat:
1. Insert the Citizen Digital Certificate into the card reader

2. Open [efile.tax.nat.gov.tw](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"} and select "Comprehensive Income Tax Electronic Filing and Payment System."

3. Select **"Natural Person Certificate"** for identity verification, then enter the PIN

4. The system automatically downloads your income and deduction data

5. Confirm/Edit → Estimate Tax → Choose Payment Method (Credit Card / Mobile Payment / Demand Deposit Deduction / Chip Debit Card / Convenience Store)

6. Upload declaration → Obtain receipt copy (PDF download recommended for record)

7. **Card Removal**
translations.1. Open the \"[Individual Income Tax Ele:
1. Open the "[Individual Income Tax Electronic Filing and Payment System](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"}" mobile version/mobile app

2. Select **"Mobile Natural Person Certificate"** for identity verification

3. The system launches the Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate App to complete verification using fingerprint/face recognition

4. The subsequent steps are the same as the desktop version (download data → trial calculation → pay tax → upload).
translations.6 種都能完成基本報稅，但只有 **自然人憑證 / 行動自然人憑證** 在後續申: All 6 methods can complete basic tax filing, but only **the Citizen Digital Certificate / Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate** are least likely to cause issues when applying for other government or financial services later. Therefore, this article focuses on these two.
translations.9.7 萬（免稅額） + 13.1 萬（標扣） + 21.8 萬（薪扣） = *: 97,000 (exemption) + 131,000 (standard deduction) + 218,000 (salary deduction) = **annual income below 446,000 is tax-exempt**

translations.> 97,000 (exemption) + 131,000 (standard: > 97,000 (exemption) + 131,000 (standard deduction) + 218,000 (salary deduction) = **annual income below 446,000 is tax-exempt**
translations.> All 6 methods can complete basic tax f: > All 6 methods can complete basic tax filing, but only **the Citizen Digital Certificate / Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate** are least likely to cause issues when applying for other government or financial services later. Therefore, this article focuses on these two.
translations.> Note: **The dependent's income will be: > Note: **The dependent's income will be included in your total comprehensive income**, so it is only beneficial if the relative's income is below the exemption amount.
translations.> Note: The three deductions for **presc: > Note: The three deductions for **preschool children, long-term care, and housing rent** have a "wealth exclusion clause." Taxpayers with combined basic income tax and separate dividend tax exceeding 940,000 NTD and a tax rate above 20% **are not eligible to claim these deductions**.
translations.> Reminder: Some components may require: > Reminder: Some components may require restarting the browser or computer. Following the steps usually resolves the issue.

translations.> The tax filing system currently promot: > The tax filing system currently promotes the "Mobile Natural Person Certificate App" process, while NFC contact with the physical card is more common in banking app scenarios.

translations.> Want to precisely calculate your tax?: > Want to precisely calculate your tax? It is recommended to use the official [Ministry of Finance Tax Portal — Income Tax Estimator](https://www.etax.nat.gov.tw/etwmain/etw158w/15){:target="_blank"} tool.
translations.MOICA 表單常見說明：PIN 碼可能有預設規則（例如身分證後 4 碼＋出生月: MOICA Form Common Instructions: The PIN may have a default pattern (e.g., the last 4 digits of your ID number + birth month and day MMDD). It is recommended to **change the PIN on MOICA immediately after receiving the card**. Default PINs are easy to guess and must be changed.

translations.iPhone 從鏡頭附近開始嘗試\n: iPhone starts trying from near the camera
translations.| | 自然人憑證 IC 卡 | 行動自然人憑證 |\n|---|---|---:
| | Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card | Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate |
|---|---|---|
| Form | Physical chip card | App bound to the phone |
| Fee | **250 NTD** | **30 NTD** (mobile device binding fee) |
| Common Use | Computer + card reader / phone NFC | App biometric authentication |
| Tax Filing | ✅ | ✅ |
| Bank Upgrade/Account Linking | ✅ (widely supported) | Depends on bank support |
| Usable without card reader? | Some services support NFC | ✅ No card reader needed |
translations.| 對象 | 金額 |\n|---|---|\n| 一般 | 每人 **9.7:
| Target Group | Amount |
|---|---|
| General | **97,000 NTD** per person |
| Taxpayers aged 70 and above, their spouses, and direct ascendants | **145,500 NTD** per person |
translations.| 批次 | 撥付/入帳日 | 適用對象 |\n|---|---|---|\n|:
| Batch | Payment/Deposit Date | Applicable Targets |
|---|---|---|
| **Batch 1** | **2026/7/31** | Those who completed online/mobile filing, online tax estimation registration, phone voice response, or paper response before 5/11 |
| **Batch 2** | **2026/10/31** | QR code/manual filings and paper responses submitted after 5/11 |
| **Batch 3** | **2027/1/20** | Late filings, cases originally declared as tax payable or no refund, and cases converted to refunds after tax office approval |
translations.| 方式 | 你需要什麼 | 適合誰 |\n|---|---|---|\n| *:
| Method | What You Need | Suitable For |
|---|---|---|
| **Citizen Digital Certificate** | Card + PIN + Card Reader | Those who want to complete everything online (including financial verification) and have a card reader at home |
| **Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate** | Mobile App (biometric binding) | Those who don't want to use a card and prefer to complete everything on their phone |
| **Registered Health Insurance Card** | Health Insurance Card + Password + Card Reader | Those already registered with the Health Insurance Bureau/branch |
| **Electronic Certificate** | Certificate issued by financial institutions and approved by the Ministry of Finance + Password | Those who already have a bank or brokerage electronic certificate |
| **Mobile Phone Verification** | Personal postpaid phone number + ID number + Health Insurance Card number | No card reader, quickest to start; Wi-Fi must be off and mobile data on |
| **Household Number + Inquiry Code** | Household number + Inquiry code (printed at convenience store kiosk or via Citizen Digital Certificate/Health Insurance Card) | No card or phone verification needed at all |
translations.| 日期 | 事件 | 備註 |\n|---|---|---|\n| **202:
| Date | Event | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **2026/5/1 (Fri)** | Start of filing period | Labor Day is a national holiday; **no in-person service** at tax offices. Online/mobile filing available 24 hours |
| Before 5/10 | Barcode/manual filing with tax payment | Tax payment and filing must be completed by this date |
| Before 5/11 | Paper tax calculation return | Affects eligibility for the first batch of tax refunds (see below) |
| 5/31 (Sun) | Original filing deadline | Falls on Sunday, so extended by law |
| **2026/6/1 (Mon)** | **Filing deadline** | Recommended to finish by 5 PM; system may be congested, filing 3 days early is safest |
translations.| 步驟 | 計算 | 金額 |\n|---|---|---|\n| 綜合所得總:
| Step | Calculation | Amount |
|---|---|---|
| Total Comprehensive Income | Salary | 1,000,000 |
| − Exemption | 97,000 | −97,000 |
| − Standard Deduction | Single 131,000 | −131,000 |
| − Special Salary Deduction | 218,000 | −218,000 |
| = **Net Comprehensive Income** | | **554,000** |
| Applicable Tax Rate | Falls in 5% bracket (≤ 590,000) | 5% |
| Tax Payable | 554,000 × 5% − 0 | **= 27,700 NTD** |

| Step | Calculation | Amount |
|---|---|---|
| Total Comprehensive Income | Salary | 1,800,000 |
| − Exemption | 97,000 | −97,000 |
| − Standard Deduction | Single 131,000 | −131,000 |
| − Special Salary Deduction | 218,000 | −218,000 |
| = **Net Comprehensive Income** | | **1,354,000** |
| Applicable Tax Rate | Falls in 20% bracket (1,330,000 – 2,660,000) | 20% |
| Tax Payable | 1,354,000 × 20% − 147,700 | **= 123,100 NTD** |
translations.| 申報身分 | 金額 |\n|---|---|\n| 單身 | **13.1:
| Filing Status | Amount |
|---|---|
| Single | **131,000 NTD** |
| Married Filing Jointly | **262,000 NTD** |
translations.| 項目 | 114 年度金額 |\n|---|---|\n| **薪資所得特別:
| Item | Amount for 2025 (Year 114) |
|---|---|
| **Special Deduction for Salary Income** | NT$218,000 per person (actual amount if salary is less) |
| **Special Deduction for Savings and Investment** | Household limit of NT$270,000 |
| **Special Deduction for Disability** | NT$218,000 per person |
| **Special Deduction for Education Tuition** | NT$25,000 per child (college level or above) |
| **Special Deduction for Preschool Children** | NT$150,000 for 1st child / NT$225,000 per child from 2nd onward |
| **Special Deduction for Long-term Care** | NT$180,000 per person (increased from Year 114) |
| **Special Deduction for Housing Rent Expenses** | Household limit of NT$180,000 (changed from itemized to special deduction since Year 113) |
translations.| 項目 | 上限／規則 |\n|---|---|\n| 捐贈 | 對教育/文化:
| Item | Limit/Rule |
|---|---|
| Donations | To education/culture/public welfare/charity organizations: within **20% of total comprehensive income**; donations to government or national defense support are **unlimited** |
| Insurance Premiums | Life insurance, labor insurance, national insurance, employment insurance, military/public education insurance: **24,000 NTD per person per year**; national health insurance is **unlimited** |
| Medical and Maternity Expenses | Public hospitals, NHI contracted hospitals, or those recognized by the Ministry of Finance: **actual itemized expenses** (insurance reimbursements cannot be deducted) |
| Mortgage Interest on Owner-Occupied Residence | **Up to 300,000 NTD per year**, limited to **one house** (must deduct special savings and investment deductions) |
| Disaster Losses | Losses from force majeure disasters (proof required, deduct insurance compensation) |
| Political Donations | According to the Political Donations Act |
translations.| 項目 | 內容 |\n|---|---|\n| 申報年度 | 114 年度（:
| Item | Details |
|---|---|
| Tax Year | Year 114 (Income from 2025/1/1 – 2025/12/31) |
| Filing Period | **2026/5/1 (Fri) – 2026/6/1 (Mon)** |
| Filing System | [efile.tax.nat.gov.tw](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"} |
| Customer Service Hotline | 0800-000-321 (08:30–17:30) |
translations.一個使用者一台裝置通常只能綁定一組憑證\n: A user can usually bind only one set of certificates per device.
translations.一句話：**線上只是「先填資料」，最後都要到戶政事務所臨櫃。**\n\n: In one sentence: **Online is only for "filling in information first"; you must go to the household registration office in person in the end.**
translations.上傳申報 → 取得收執聯（建議下載 PDF 留存）\n: Upload declaration → Obtain receipt copy (PDF download recommended for record)
translations.不一定。財政部提供 6 種驗證方式（見第二章），但自然人憑證/行動自然人憑證在「: Not necessarily. The Ministry of Finance offers 6 verification methods (see Chapter 2), but the Citizen Digital Certificate / Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate are the most convenient for "downloading complete income data" and "supporting subsequent financial services."
translations.不同瀏覽器與作業系統會要求不同元件，最穩做法是直接照官方下載頁安裝：\n\n: Different browsers and operating systems require different components. The most reliable method is to install directly from the official download page:
translations.不要拿到卡就急著登入網站，先把下一章看完（PIN / 用戶代碼 / 安全）。\n: Do not rush to log in to the website right after receiving the card. First, finish reading the next chapter (PIN / User Code / Security).
translations.之後再匯款時就能選「以約定帳戶匯款」，流程會更快也更安全：\n\n: Next time you make a transfer, you can choose "Transfer from the designated account," making the process faster and more secure:
translations.以下假設皆為**單身上班族、無扶養親屬、採標準扣除、薪資為唯一所得**：\n\n: The following assumptions apply to **single employees, no dependents, standard deduction, salary as the sole income**:
translations.以下數字皆為 **2026/5 申報 114 年度** 適用，依 [財政部賦稅署: The following figures apply to **May 2026 declaration for the 114th tax year**, according to the [Ministry of Finance Taxation Agency announcement](https://www.dot.gov.tw/singlehtml/ch26?cntId=f55dca4144f54f7195a5ddfce4c08fbe){:target="_blank"} and the [Ministry of Finance Taipei National Taxation Bureau](https://www.ntbt.gov.tw/multiplehtml/f4e3899a499b4f05821af5a5afadd2f5){:target="_blank"}:
translations.依 MOICA 表單常見說明，實體自然人憑證常見效期為 **5 年**（仍請以卡: According to the MOICA form FAQ, the physical Citizen Digital Certificate typically has a validity period of **5 years** (please refer to the card or official announcements for confirmation).
translations.依 [中區國稅局直撥退稅日程](https://www.ntbca.gov.tw: According to the [Central Taiwan National Taxation Bureau Direct Refund Schedule](https://www.ntbca.gov.tw/singlehtml/07a3fe27c7894f40b1edb16c389fc712?cntId=aeaf62902d4a48389e2b4c314afc260b){:target="_blank"} announcement:
translations.依 [財政部](https://www.mof.gov.tw/singlehtm: According to the [Ministry of Finance](https://www.mof.gov.tw/singlehtml/384fb3077bb349ea973e7fc6f13b6974?cntId=7a895732758945b8a1b80995c9ebc87b){:target="_blank"} and the [Central Tax Bureau Direct Refund Schedule](https://www.ntbca.gov.tw/singlehtml/07a3fe27c7894f40b1edb16c389fc712?cntId=aeaf62902d4a48389e2b4c314afc260b){:target="_blank"}, the entire process spans from May to January of the following year:
translations.依《所得稅法》規定，**夫妻原則上應合併申報**（婚姻關係存續中）。系統提供 3: According to the Income Tax Act, **spouses should generally file jointly** (while the marriage is valid). The system offers 3 calculation methods and automatically selects the "lowest tax amount":
translations.依國稅局規定，可申報扶養：\n\n: According to the National Taxation Bureau regulations, the following dependents can be claimed:
translations.依據 [財政部中區國稅局「在家網路報稅 6 招」](https://www.nt: According to [Ministry of Finance Central Taiwan National Taxation Bureau "6 Tips for Filing Taxes Online at Home"](https://www.ntbca.gov.tw/singlehtml/374b083c2cc84ea795167b6a77180811?cntId=dbc1d3e576924c239a60506c69c51f9f){:target="_blank"}, in 2026 you can log in to the e-filing system using the following 6 methods:
translations.依財政部規定，可申請**延期或分期繳納**：\n\n: According to the Ministry of Finance regulations, you can apply for **deferred or installment payment**:
translations.卡片要平貼、慢慢移動找感應點\n: Place the card flat and move it slowly to find the sensing point.
translations.即使年所得低於門檻，只要**雇主有預扣稅款**（薪資扣繳）就應該申報，否則錢拿不: Even if your annual income is below the threshold, you should file a tax return as long as **your employer has withheld taxes** (salary withholding); otherwise, you won't get the money back.
translations.原則：**先讓憑證失效（停用/廢止），再處理補發**。避免被撿到的人嘗試濫用。\: Principle: **Invalidate the certificate first (deactivate/revoke), then proceed with reissuance**. This prevents misuse by anyone who might find it.
translations.可能需要定期更新金鑰/展期（例如到期前 60 天可展期 1 年）\n: You may need to update or renew the key periodically (for example, you can renew for 1 year within 60 days before expiration).
translations.各類所得分開計稅（其餘合併）\n: Separate Taxation for Different Types of Income (Others Combined)
translations.報完稅這張卡別冰起來，它在「需要可信任身分驗證/簽章」的場景非常好用。\n\n: After filing taxes, don't just put this card away; it's very useful in situations that require trusted identity verification or digital signatures.
translations.報稅當天最常見的卡關不是「不會操作」，而是：忘記 PIN、PIN 輸錯鎖卡、不知: The most common issues on tax filing day are not "lack of operation skills," but rather: forgetting the PIN, locking the card due to incorrect PIN entries, and not knowing the user code.
translations.報稅系統元件：[綜合所得稅電子結算申報繳稅系統](https://efile.t: Tax Filing System Component: [Integrated Income Tax Electronic Filing and Payment System](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"} (The homepage will guide you to download)
translations.報稅系統目前主推的是「行動自然人憑證 App」流程，NFC 感應實體卡較常出現在: The tax filing system currently promotes the "Mobile Natural Person Certificate App" process, while NFC contact with the physical card is more common in banking app scenarios.
translations.如果你只有實體卡、沒有讀卡機，部分服務支援用手機 NFC 感應卡片完成驗證。\n: If you only have the physical card but no card reader, some services support using your phone's NFC to read the card for verification.
translations.如果你報完稅順便想處理「銀行驗證／提升轉帳額度／設定約定帳戶」，推薦你接著看：\: If you want to handle "bank verification / increase transfer limit / set up designated accounts" after filing your taxes, we recommend you continue reading:
translations.完成簡訊驗證後，會看到新增成功：\n\n: After completing the SMS verification, you will see a successful addition message:
Official Entry: [MOICA Citizen Digital Certificate Application Form](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/rac_form.html){:target="_blank"}
translations.官方常見提醒「用戶代碼不會被系統記錄」，遺失後通常需要臨櫃處理。所以一定要離線保: Official reminder: "The user code will not be recorded by the system." If lost, you usually need to handle it in person at the service counter. Therefore, be sure to keep it offline.
translations.小提醒：某些元件會要重新啟動瀏覽器或電腦，照步驟做通常就能過。\n\n: Reminder: Some components may require restarting the browser or computer. Following the steps usually resolves the issue.
translations.已下載並綁定行動自然人憑證 App（綁定費 30 元，需先臨櫃辦理一次）\n: The Mobile Natural Person Certificate App has been downloaded and linked (binding fee is 30 NTD, and an in-person visit is required once beforehand).
translations.建議**還是上系統查一次**。即使你覺得自己沒收入，可能仍有：\n\n: It is recommended to **check the system once more**. Even if you think you have no income, you might still have:
translations.後續流程同電腦版（下載資料 → 試算 → 繳稅 → 上傳）\n: The subsequent steps are the same as the desktop version (download data → trial calculation → pay tax → upload).
translations.想精算自己的稅？建議直接用 [財政部稅務入口網 — 綜合所得稅試算](https: Want to precisely calculate your tax? It is recommended to use the official [Ministry of Finance Tax Portal — Income Tax Estimator](https://www.etax.nat.gov.tw/etwmain/etw158w/15){:target="_blank"} tool.
translations.打開「[綜合所得稅電子結算申報繳稅系統](https://efile.tax.n: Open the "[Individual Income Tax Electronic Filing and Payment System](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"}" mobile version/mobile app
translations.把自然人憑證插入讀卡機\n: Insert the Citizen Digital Certificate into the card reader
translations.有安全使用期限（例如最長 8 年，期滿需再臨櫃申辦）\n: Has a valid usage period (e.g., up to 8 years, after which in-person renewal is required)
translations.有支援生物辨識（指紋/臉部）的手機\n: Phones that support biometric authentication (fingerprint/face recognition)
translations.服務端要求「感應後不要移動直到完成」\n: The server requires "Do not move after sensing until completion."
translations.本文以官方資訊整理，內容可能隨政策/網站改版變動，請以財政部、MOICA 與各服:
This article is compiled from official information and may change with policy or website updates. Please refer to announcements from the Ministry of Finance, MOICA, and respective service websites.  
Further reading (bank practical case): [LINE Bank Deposit to Firstrade, Account Upgrade, Designated Account Tutorial](/posts/e4d139fe0685/)
translations.每人 **21.3 萬元**（114 年度，較前一年調高 0.3 萬）。 \n:
Each person **213,000 NTD** (for 2026, increased by 3,000 NTD from the previous year).  
If the total basic living expenses exceed the sum of the "exemption amount + general deduction + some special deductions," the difference can be further deducted from the total comprehensive income.
translations.每年 5 月又到報稅季。2026 年的綜合所得稅（114 年度）申報期間是 **: Tax season comes every May. The 2026 comprehensive income tax filing period (Year 114) is **2026/5/1 – 2026/6/1** (extended one day since 5/31 falls on Sunday). The Ministry of Finance still offers "6 Ways to File Taxes Online at Home," but for those who want to complete everything online and support all financial/government services, **the Natural Person Certificate remains the most complete option**.
translations.注意：**被扶養人的所得會併入你的綜合所得總額**，所以親屬本身所得低於免稅額才: Note: **The dependent's income will be included in your total comprehensive income**, so it is only beneficial if the relative's income is below the exemption amount.
translations.注意：分期會加計利息（按郵政儲金一年期定存利率）\n: Note: Installment payments will include interest (calculated based on the one-year postal savings fixed deposit rate).
translations.用戶代碼用來做「解鎖／停用／復用」等管理操作。 \n**官方常見提醒：用戶代碼:
The user code is used for management operations such as "unlocking/deactivating/reactivating."  
**Official frequent reminder: The user code is not registered in the system**, so you must keep it safe yourself (offline writing is the safest).
translations.用自然人憑證登入 efile，「所得資料」一拉就知道。\n\n: Log in to efile with your Citizen Digital Certificate, and your "Income Data" will be displayed instantly.
translations.申請方式：報稅期間在 efile 系統內勾選分期，或事後向國稅局申請\n: Application Method: Select installment payment within the efile system during the tax filing period or apply to the National Taxation Bureau afterward.
translations.申請門檻：個人欠稅 **2 萬以上**可申請分期，最長 **36 期**（每期最: Application Threshold: Individuals with tax arrears of **20,000 or more** can apply for installment payments, with a maximum of **36 installments** (minimum 2,000 per installment)
translations.確認/編修 → 試算 → 選擇繳稅方式（信用卡 / 行動支付 / 活儲扣款 /: Confirm/Edit → Estimate Tax → Choose Payment Method (Credit Card / Mobile Payment / Demand Deposit Deduction / Chip Debit Card / Convenience Store)
translations.第一次使用通常會先做「自然人憑證驗證＋視訊驗證」，完成後就能新增約定帳號：\n\: For first-time users, usually start with "Citizen Digital Certificate Verification + Video Verification." After completion, you can add a designated bank account:
translations.系統喚起行動自然人憑證 App，用指紋/臉部完成驗證\n: The system launches the Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate App to complete verification using fingerprint/face recognition
translations.系統自動下載你的所得、扣除額資料\n: The system automatically downloads your income and deduction data
translations.線上申請資料通常**只保留 7 天**：填完別放著，抓時間去戶政臨櫃\n: Online application data is usually **kept for only 7 days**: don’t leave it unfinished, make sure to visit the household registration office in time.
translations.自然人憑證 IC 卡（已啟用、PIN 沒鎖）\n: Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card (Activated, PIN Not Locked)
translations.自然人憑證 IC 卡：工本費 **250 元**\n: Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card: Issuance Fee **250 NTD**
translations.自然人憑證的感應範圍很小，需要「對位置」：\n\n: The NFC range of the Citizen Digital Certificate is very short and requires "precise alignment":
translations.自然人憑證跨平台網頁元件：[MOICA 跨平台網頁元件下載](https://m: Natural Person Certificate Cross-Platform Web Component: [MOICA Cross-Platform Web Component Download](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/rac_plugin.html){:target="_blank"}
translations.若有適用「房屋租金支出」特別扣除（上限 18 萬），門檻可拉到約 **62.6: If the "House Rent Expense" special deduction applies (up to 180,000), the threshold can be raised to about **626,000**.
translations.薪資所得分開計稅（其餘合併）\n: Separate Taxation for Salary Income (Others Combined)
translations.行動自然人憑證確認 App 已綁定、生物辨識正常\n: Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate Confirmation App is Bound and Biometric Authentication is Working Normally
translations.行動自然人憑證：綁定費 **30 元**\n: Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate: Binding Fee **30 NTD**
translations.表單填的「用戶代碼」**官方不會代為記錄**，要自己保管好\n: The "User Code" you enter in the form **will not be recorded by the authorities**, so you must keep it safe yourself.
translations.要。所得稅是**全年所得總額制**，不分主業副業。常見類型：\n\n: Income tax is based on the **total annual income**, regardless of main or side jobs. Common types include:
translations.註：**幼兒學前、長照、房屋租金**三項扣除額有「排富條款」，適用 20% 以上: Note: The three deductions for **preschool children, long-term care, and housing rent** have a "wealth exclusion clause." Those with a combined basic income tax and separate dividend tax exceeding 940,000 NTD and subject to a tax rate above 20% **are not allowed to claim these deductions**.
translations.讀卡機：自行選購\n: Card Reader: Purchase on Your Own
Source: [Taipei National Tax Administration, Ministry of Finance — Applicable Tax Rates](https://www.ntbt.gov.tw/multiplehtml/1b82b380e1a34de9afd204d39b007db2){:target="_blank"}, [Ministry of Finance Taxation Agency Announcement](https://www.dot.gov.tw/singlehtml/ch26?cntId=f55dca4144f54f7195a5ddfce4c08fbe){:target="_blank"}
translations.身分驗證選 **「自然人憑證」**，輸入 PIN\n: Select **"Natural Person Certificate"** for identity verification, then enter the PIN
translations.身分驗證選 **「行動自然人憑證」**\n: Select **"Mobile Natural Person Certificate"** for identity verification
This article mainly uses three gov.tw sources: [Ministry of Finance E-Filing and Tax Payment Service](https://tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"}, [Central Taiwan National Taxation Bureau "6 Tips for Filing Taxes at Home Online"](https://www.ntbca.gov.tw/singlehtml/374b083c2cc84ea795167b6a77180811?cntId=dbc1d3e576924c239a60506c69c51f9f){:target="_blank"}, and [MOICA National Certification Authority](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"}. It covers 2026 tax filing, natural person certificate application/use, filing steps, and key new regulations all at once.
translations.這類服務常見會提供多種登入（自然人憑證、健保卡、手機驗證），差別通常在「可查到的: These services often offer multiple login options (Natural Person Certificate, Health Insurance Card, Mobile Verification). The differences usually lie in the "depth of accessible data" and "whether a digital signature is required."
translations.進度查詢：[財政部稅務入口網](https://www.etax.nat.gov: Progress Inquiry: Check the "Comprehensive Income Tax Filing and Refund Status" on the [Ministry of Finance Tax Portal](https://www.etax.nat.gov.tw/etwmain/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.重點是「任一戶所」：通常**不必回戶籍地**。 \n現場流程：核對身分 → 繳:
The key point is "any household registration office": usually, **you do not need to return to your registered domicile**.  
On-site process: identity verification → payment → set/confirm password → card collection.
translations.銀行利息（雖然低於 27 萬儲蓄特扣免課，仍會出現）\n: Bank interest (although below the 270,000 special savings deduction exemption, it will still appear)
Open [efile.tax.nat.gov.tw](https://efile.tax.nat.gov.tw/){:target="_blank"} and select "Comprehensive Income Tax Electronic Filing and Payment System."
